apps.name: HungryDragon
apps.subtitle: Hungry Dragons Evolution
apps.localizedDescription:
Features:
- NO ADS

- Currency Unlimited

- Pet Unlocked

- Revive Cost 0

- EAT Radius

- Booster Max

- HP [ Auto Drain OFF ]

privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: Used to listen to music while playing.
privacy.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Some ad content may create a calendar event.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used for taking pictures of your dragons!
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Used for taking pictures of your dragons!
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used for taking pictures of your dragons!
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This allows to display personalized ads. Refusing will not reduce the displayed number of ads.
